title: Node
description: A node resource representing an individual backend server by its IP address or FQDN. Nodes are automatically created when pool members are added, or can be created independently.

name.description: Name of the node (typically the IP address).

dynamicRatio.description: Dynamic ratio weight for load balancing.

ephemeral.description: Whether this is a transient auto-discovered node.

fqdn.description: FQDN configuration for DNS-based node resolution.

monitor.description: Health monitor applied to the node.

rateLimit.description: Maximum connections per second. 0 means no limit.

ratio.description: Fixed ratio weight for load balancing.
